title: StaffUtils
body:
![title1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/199dd29167d311073983005ffdb4b6967bd1ae35.png)
_Requires [CommandAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/commandapi) & [ConfigAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/configapi)._

This plugin consists of a command-based system that provides various utilities and functions for server staff. It is recommended for series or events, where it will be most useful.

You can customize some values â€‹â€‹in the config.yml file.

The main functions and utilities include:
- **Vanish:** Be hidden from other players while in any game mode.
- **Staff Chat:** A private chat for staff members.
- **Give Staff:** Quickly assign op, a group of LuckPerms, and a vanilla team to a staff member (modifiable in the configuration).
- **Freeze:** Freeze players, meaning they cannot move.
- **Invsee:** View player inventory (this cannot be changed).

![title2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e63cec579a64218303529b27dd3cbb543f00e0.png)

```
{
  "give": {
    "luckPermsEnable": true,
    "luckPermsGroup": "staff",
    "team": "staff",
    "op": true
  },
  "consoleLogs": false
}
```

**Commands:**
- /su vanish | Toggle vanish mode.
- /su chat | Toggle staff chat.
- /su give <player> | Give staff to player.
- /su freeze <player> | Freeze player.
- /su invsee <player> | See player's inventory.
  
**Permissions:**
- staffutils.staff | General staff permission.
- staffutils.command | Main command permission.
- staffutils.staffchat | See message of staff chat.

![title3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0744e45a15bfd8153a30646b1bf2d5e2b464e041.png)

If you have any problem or suggestion you can report it in the community discord (Spanish-speaking) by opening a ticket: https://discord.gg/sKRYYyVCnw

If you want to support us you can do so through:
- Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/BannedStudios
- Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/soykatto
